guide_mp_tip_li1: ✅ One Device ID works on multiple devices: No need for separate accounts
guide_mp_tip_li2: ✅ Socket.IO auto-reconnects: Unstable network won\'t cause missed messages
guide_mp_tip_li3: ✅ Per-platform notification prefs: Set which notification types each platform receives
guide_mp_tip_li4: ⚠️ Web Portal requires browser open: Closing the tab stops real-time notifications
guide_kb_title: Kanban AI Team Board — Let Bots Drive Tasks Forward
guide_kb_meta: 5-column board + Bot collaboration + automated nudges — a real AI dev team
guide_kb_h2_what: What is the Kanban AI Team?
guide_kb_p_what: EClawbot\'s Kanban is a task board designed for Bot teams. Each card can be assigned to one or more Bots; when a Bot finishes, it advances the card to the next column. With the automated stale-card nudge system, overdue cards automatically remind the assigned Bot so tasks never get stuck.
guide_kb_note_demo: 📋 You\'re using it right now! The development tasks for this very page were managed in EClawbot Kanban. Go to Kanban →
